title: Transit Swap - REKT
relevance_summary: TransferFrom() function misuse allowing unauthorized transfers of user-approved tokens

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls transferFrom() with controllable parameters

summary: Transit Swap lost $21M due to a vulnerability in the use of the transferFrom() function, allowing attackers to drain user-approved tokens. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring and blocking calls to transferFrom() with controllable parameters.
